---
title: "Adrim Hamed Outmani"
subtitle: "Pharmacist & Bioinformatician | AI & Precision Medicine Specialist"
image: ../media/profile.jpg 
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/adrim-hamed-outmani-047491290
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Aderfi
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact
      href: mailto:adrimh.outmani@gmail.com
---

## 💊 Transforming the Genome into Clinical Decisions

I am a professional with a background in **Pharmacy** and advanced specialization in **Bioinformatics**. My focus is on merging clinical laboratory precision with computational power to interpret large volumes of genomic data.

My career in **Pharmacogenomics** began with my research on hypertension and has evolved towards the development of **Deep Learning** models that identify the optimal treatment for each patient, minimizing risks and maximizing therapeutic efficacy.

---

### 🚀 Projects and Specialization: Pharmagen

My main project, **Pharmagen**, is the culmination of my technical and clinical training. It is a comprehensive system that automates everything from **NGS** data processing in **Debian 13** environments to phenotypic prediction using hybrid neural networks.

* **Clinical Precision:** Multi-label inference with an accuracy of **86.89%** in phenotypic categories.
* **Data Engineering:** Robust pipelines integrating tools such as **BWA, GATK, and Samtools**.
* **Innovation:** Development of **DeepFM** architectures and transition towards **Graph Neural Networks (GNN)**.

---

### 🛠️ Technical Profile & Certifications

I have complemented my healthcare background with solid training in data analysis and programming:

* **Programming:** Specialist in **Python** (300h certification from UOC) and **C++**.
* **Machine Learning & Big Data:** Specific 100h training at the **University of Granada** applied to Bioinformatics.
* **Environment:** Proficiency in administration and development in **GNU/Linux (Debian)**.
* **Languages:** Bilingual profile in **Spanish** and **Tamazight**, with professional proficiency in **English (B2)**.

---

### 📚 Academic Background

* **Master's in Bioinformatics** | Valencia International University (2025-2026).
* **Degree in Pharmacy** | University of Granada (Focus on Pharmacogenomics).
* **Course in Nanomedicines** | Pharmacy Academy Sta. María de España.

---

> "My mission is to bridge the gap between genomic Big Data and the patient, transforming biological variability into precise and reproducible health algorithms."
